env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home
sin-code execute --command 'mkdir -p $WORK/source-plugin/bin'
stdout 'Exit:'
sin-code execute --command 'printf "name = \"hello-plugin\"\nversion = \"1.0.0\"\n[[subcommand]]\nname = \"greet\"\nbinary = \"./bin/greet\"\n" > $WORK/source-plugin/plugin.toml'
stdout 'Exit:'
sin-code execute --command 'printf "#!/bin/sh\necho hi\n" > $WORK/source-plugin/bin/greet && chmod +x $WORK/source-plugin/bin/greet'
stdout 'Exit:'
sin-code execute --command 'mkdir -p $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins && cp -r $WORK/source-plugin $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins/hello-plugin'
stdout 'Exit:'
sin-code plugin --path $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins list
stdout 'hello-plugin'
stdout '1.0.0'
sin-code plugin --path $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins info hello-plugin
stdout 'Version:'
stdout 'Subcommands:'
stdout 'greet'
sin-code plugin --path $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins disable hello-plugin
stdout 'Disabled'
sin-code plugin --path $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins enable hello-plugin
stdout 'Enabled'
